intent: Execute a complete NEBNext Ultra II DNA Library Prep workflow including: 1) End repair/A-tailing with ERAT enzyme (10µL) at 20°C for 30min then 65°C for 30min, 2) Adapter ligation with 2.5µL adapter and 31µL ligase at 20°C for 15min, 3) 0.8x AMPure XP bead cleanup with dual 70% ethanol washes and RSB resuspension, 4) PCR amplification with indexed primers (10µL) and 28µL Hot Start User mix using thermocycler profile, 5) Final 0.8x AMPure cleanup with ethanol washes and 32µL RSB elution. Protocol accommodates 8-24 samples with magnetic module for bead separations and temperature control for reagents.

output_schema.protocol_name: NEBNext® Ultra™ II DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina®
output_schema.author: Opentrons <protocols@opentrons.com>

commands.message: THIS IS A NO MODULE RUN
THIS PROTOCOL WILL REUSE TIPS FOR WASHES
SETTING THERMO and TEMP BLOCK Temperature
Seal, Run LIG (15min) Lid Remains open
